label: Autonomous vehicles, drones & navigation

node.label: Autonomous vehicles, drones & navigation
node.definition: Autonomous vehicles and drones localize, perceive, predict, plan, and control motion while satisfying real-time physical and safety constraints.
node.why_it_matters: This system is an application boundary where technical capability, evidence, safety controls, economics, and user workflow must succeed together.

limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Robotics & embodied AI, Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection.
